sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_fuzzy (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_fuzzy VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'fuzzy matching'), (3, 'test case');
SELECT id, multiFuzzyMatchAnyIndex(text, 1, ['hello', 'fuzzy']) AS match_index FROM test_fuzzy;
UPDATE test_fuzzy SET text = 'matching test' WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id FROM test_fuzzy WHERE multiFuzzyMatchAnyIndex(text, 2, ['test', 'world']) IS NOT NULL;
